summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of EXEC-1 Executive Portal endpoints. All 3 new endpoints (kpi-detail, datapoint-breakdown, outlet-profile) working correctly with real data validation. Existing executive endpoints regression test passed.
passed_tests: Auth requirements: All executive endpoints properly reject requests without Bearer token (403)
KPI Detail endpoint: All 6 metrics (revenue, gross_profit, expenses, cash_sales, card_sales, online_sales) working
KPI Detail features: Compare mode, outlet filtering, proper response structure validation
Datapoint Breakdown: Revenue and expenses breakdown with outlet filtering
Outlet Profile: Valid/invalid outlet_id handling, proper metrics structure
Regression test: All 5 existing executive endpoints still working (overview, revenue-trend, alerts-summary, inventory-health, outlet-ranking)
Real data validation: Confirmed endpoints return actual data (Rp 886M revenue with 2 contributors)
